title: 「By itself」句型
titleEn: Using By itself to mean ‘on its own’, ‘alone’ or ‘without help’

source.file: Sentence Structure 78 -「By itself」表示「本身／獨自／自行」.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Singular non-human subject + verb / be + other information + by itself

formulas.formula: Singular non-human subject + verb / be + other information + by itself
By itself, + singular non-human subject + verb / be + other information

example: The song is already beautiful by itself.

examples.en: The song is already beautiful by itself.
The machine completed the task by itself.

meaning.zh: By itself 可以表示「獨自」、「無需協助／自行」或「單憑本身／不加其他東西」。

rules.zh: By itself 有三個常見意思：獨自、無需協助／自行，以及單憑本身／不加其他東西。
rules.en: By itself has three common meanings: alone, without help, and without anything extra.

rules.zh: Itself 必須配合單數非人物主語；人物或複數主語須使用其他反身代名詞。
rules.en: Itself agrees with a singular non-human subject.

rules.zh: By itself 通常放在句末，也可以放在句首以強調「單憑這一項」。
rules.en: By itself normally appears at the end, but it may begin the sentence for emphasis.

rules.zh: 不要混淆表示強調的 itself 和表示「不需要協助」的 by itself。
rules.en: Do not confuse emphatic itself with by itself meaning without help.

rules.zh: By itself 不一定表示實際上沒有其他東西在附近；它也可表示事物本身已有某種特質。
rules.en: By itself does not always mean that nothing else is physically nearby.

benefits.zh: 這個句型可以清楚表示機器、動物、系統或物件在沒有人協助的情況下完成動作。
benefits.en: It clearly shows that something does not need help.

benefits.zh: 它可以說明單憑一項事實、行動或事物是否足以帶來某個結果。
benefits.en: It shows whether one thing alone is enough.

benefits.zh: 它可以表示某件事物即使不加入其他東西，本身已經吸引、實用、美味或有效。
benefits.en: It shows that something already has a quality without anything extra.

benefits.zh: 它能把「沒有協助」、「沒有加入其他東西」或「沒有人控制」等較長說法縮短。
benefits.en: It shortens longer expressions such as without help.

benefits.zh: 以 By itself 開始句子，可以強調單憑某一項事物能夠或不能夠做到甚麼。
benefits.en: It emphasises the effect or limitation of one factor.

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using by itself while preserving the original meaning.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 by itself 改寫以下句子，並保留原句意思。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: No one touched the door, but it closed.
questions.promptZh: 沒有人碰那道門，但它關上了。
questions.answer: The door closed by itself.
questions.answerZh: 那道門自行關上了。
questions.highlight: The door closed by itself.

questions.prompt: This toy car moves without anyone pushing it.
questions.promptZh: 這輛玩具車不需要任何人推動也能移動。
questions.answer: This toy car moves by itself.
questions.answerZh: 這輛玩具車會自行移動。
questions.highlight: This toy car moves by itself.

questions.prompt: Nobody touched the switch, but the lamp turned on.
questions.promptZh: 沒有人碰開關，但那盞燈亮了。
